description: Extracts student invoice fields from CloudXeus course purchase invoices.

studentName.description: The full name of the student billed on the invoice.

studentEmail.description: The email address of the student or billing contact.

invoiceNumber.description: The unique invoice number, usually starting with INV-CX.

invoiceDate.description: The date when the invoice was issued.

courseCode.description: The certification course code, such as AI-103, AI-901, AZ-104, DP-600, or DP-700.

courseName.description: The course title listed on the invoice.

totalAmount.description: The final total amount charged or due on the invoice.

paymentStatus.description: The payment status, such as Paid, Pending, Failed, or Manual Review Required.
